understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by positioning every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') simultaneously. The player must use CLICK to switch between selectable pieces and MOVE actions to navigate, pushing blocks as needed, while respecting step budgets per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses pixel coordinates with 3px per grid cell. MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN shift the currently selected piece. Adjacent pushable blocks (B) are pushed if there is space. Walls (#) block movement but some boundaries may behave unexpectedly. The player can switch the active piece with CLICK at its exact pixel position. The game provides a semantic grid with P for selected, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals. Winning a level requires all goals occupied by selectable pieces simultaneously.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by positioning every selectable piece onto a goal tile (marked '+') simultaneously. The player must use CLICK to switch between selectable pieces and MOVE actions to navigate, pushing blocks as needed, while respecting step budgets per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses pixel coordinates with 3px per grid cell. MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN shift the currently selected piece. Adjacent pushable blocks (B) are pushed if there is space. Walls (#) block movement but some boundaries may behave unexpectedly. The player can switch the active piece with CLICK at its exact pixel position. The game provides a semantic grid with P for selected, S for other selectables, B for blocks, # for walls, + for goals. Winning a level requires all goals occupied by selectable pieces simultaneously.
